title: Likely shape of new Latvian government emerges
summary_full: The shape of Latvia's potential new government coalition became more apparent on Wednesday with a four-party model looking likely to take a five-month mandate.
summary_public: The shape of Latvia's potential new government coalition became more apparent on Wednesday with a four-party model looking likely to take a five-month mandate.

LV.label: neutral
